title: Notifications - Low battery after unplugging the power cable
scenario: Verify that when a device with low battery (below 5%) is unplugged from charging, the notification changes from charging to low battery notification.
steps: 1. Ensure the device battery is below 5%.
2. Plug the device into a power source.
3. Observe the charging notification displayed on the device.
4. Unplug the power cable from the device.
5. Observe the notification on the device after unplugging.
expected: After unplugging the power cable, the notification should change to a low battery notification.
